_description: Bronze Layer Email Record Template - Raw, Immutable, NO AI Processing
_purpose: Documentation of Bronze layer structure for email records extracted from PST/MSG files
_rules: Append-only: Records are never modified after creation
No AI: No transformation, summarization, or enrichment
Raw extraction: Preserve original content exactly as found
Lineage: Every record traces to source file
ingestion_time: ISO-8601 timestamp of when record was created
raw_content: For non-email documents (PDF, DOCX, etc.) - raw text content
raw_binary_path: Path to binary file if stored separately (images, PDFs)

email_headers._description: Raw email headers for threading and deduplication
email_headers.folder: PST folder path where email was found

email_body_text: Plain text body of the email - extracted as-is
email_body_html: HTML body of the email - preserved for OCR if needed

email_attachments._description: List of attachments extracted from email

email_thread_id: Thread grouping ID if available from email client

document_metadata._description: Metadata extracted from email headers - raw, not parsed
document_metadata.subject: Email subject line

_notes.deduplication: Same email appearing in multiple PSTs detected via message_id
_notes.threading: in_reply_to and references enable conversation reconstruction
_notes.attachments: Only useful documents stored (PDFs, Office docs), not inline images/icons
_notes.silver_processing: Silver layer parses participants, cleans content, adds AI enrichment
